name: packinspect-anomaly-detector
desc: PackInspect is a low-code visual inspection tool built using TensorFlow and Streamlit. It allows users to detect defects in bottle images (or similar packaging…
descFull: PackInspect is a low-code visual inspection tool built using TensorFlow and Streamlit. It allows users to detect defects in bottle images (or similar packaging components) by uploading images or capturing them via webcam.
